FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct TextSpan

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

One inline run of a rich-text paragraph (the WinUI TextBlock.Inlines Run/Bold/Hyperlink model, rtb-01). A SpanTextEl paragraph is an array of these; the WHOLE paragraph shapes as ONE flow (spans concatenated, wrapped together — exactly how WinUI lays a paragraph's inline collection, RichTextBlock.g.h:63 get_Blocks).

Weight 0 / Size null / FontFamily null / Color A==0 all mean "inherit the paragraph base". OnClick non-null makes this a HYPERLINK span: the engine resolves the Hand cursor over the span's laid-out rects and fires the action on click/tap — WinUI's inline Hyperlink (SetCursor(MouseCursorHand) on hyperlink hover, RichTextBlock.cpp:2995 / TextBlock.cpp:3488). Accent foreground + underline styling is the CALLER's job (HyperlinkForeground theming, generic.xaml:1120-1122).

No italic axis: the shaper resolves faces by (family, weight) only — DWRITE_FONT_STYLE_NORMAL is fixed (TextLayoutEngine face resolution); FontStyle arrives with the italics workstream (plan §Text display).

public readonly record struct TextSpan : IEquatable<TextSpan>
Implements
IEquatable<TextSpan>
Inherited Members
ValueType.Equals(object)
ValueType.GetHashCode()
ValueType.ToString()
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

TextSpan(string, ushort, ColorF, bool, bool, float?, string?, Action?)

One inline run of a rich-text paragraph (the WinUI TextBlock.Inlines Run/Bold/Hyperlink model, rtb-01). A SpanTextEl paragraph is an array of these; the WHOLE paragraph shapes as ONE flow (spans concatenated, wrapped together — exactly how WinUI lays a paragraph's inline collection, RichTextBlock.g.h:63 get_Blocks).

Weight 0 / Size null / FontFamily null / Color A==0 all mean "inherit the paragraph base". OnClick non-null makes this a HYPERLINK span: the engine resolves the Hand cursor over the span's laid-out rects and fires the action on click/tap — WinUI's inline Hyperlink (SetCursor(MouseCursorHand) on hyperlink hover, RichTextBlock.cpp:2995 / TextBlock.cpp:3488). Accent foreground + underline styling is the CALLER's job (HyperlinkForeground theming, generic.xaml:1120-1122).

No italic axis: the shaper resolves faces by (family, weight) only — DWRITE_FONT_STYLE_NORMAL is fixed (TextLayoutEngine face resolution); FontStyle arrives with the italics workstream (plan §Text display).

public TextSpan(string Text, ushort Weight = 0, ColorF Color = default, bool Underline = false, bool Strikethrough = false, float? Size = null, string? FontFamily = null, Action? OnClick = null)

Weight ushort
Color ColorF
Underline bool
Strikethrough bool
Size float?
FontFamily string
OnClick Action

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
